---
title: "Course Materials"
---


```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
```


```{r}
#| include: false
materials <- read_csv("contents.csv")
materials <- materials |>
  mutate( Title = paste0("<a href=\"/Course_Notes/", link, "\">", Title, "</a>" )) |>
  select(!link)

options(DT.options = list(order = list(4, 'desc')))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

datatable(materials, rownames = FALSE, style = 'bootstrap', class = "table-condensed table-striped", escape = FALSE)
```
